promptInput.waitForResponse: wait for the current response or press esc to interrupt
promptInput.footer: enter send · shift+enter newline · @ files · ctrl+v image · / commands · ctrl+d exit
promptInput.footerBusy: esc to interrupt · ctrl+c to cancel input

app.sessionAgentSteps: The AI agent has taken several steps but hasn't reached a conclusion yet. Do you want to continue?
app.apiKeyNotFound: OpenAI API key not found. Please configure ~/.deepcode/settings.json or ./.deepcode/settings.json.

welcome.pasteImage: Paste an image from the clipboard
welcome.openMenu: Open the skills and commands menu

slashCommands.modelDesc: Select model, thinking mode and effort control
slashCommands.initDesc: Initialize an AGENTS.md file with instructions for LLM
slashCommands.resumeDesc: Pick a previous conversation to continue
slashCommands.continueDesc: Continue the active conversation or pick one to resume
slashCommands.undoDesc: Restore code and/or conversation to a previous point
slashCommands.mcpDesc: Show MCP server status and available tools
slashCommands.rawDesc: Toggle display mode for viewing or collapsing reasoning content

session.compacting: The conversation is getting long, compacting...
session.skillPromptHeader: Use the skill document below to assist the user:

prompt.skillDocumentsHeader: Use the skill documents below to assist the user:
prompt.dateAndModel:
Today is {date}. As the conversation progresses, time passes.
Current LLM model is {model}. You can switch models using the /model command.
prompt.thinkingLanguageInstruction: IMPORTANT: Your reasoning and thinking process should be in English.
prompt.replyLanguageInstruction: IMPORTANT: Always respond to the user in English.

help.title: deepcode - Deep Code CLI
help.launchTui: deepcode                              Launch the interactive TUI in the current directory
help.launchWithPrompt: deepcode -p <prompt>                  Launch with a pre-filled prompt
help.userSettings: ~/.deepcode/settings.json    User-level API key, model, base URL
help.homeEnd: home/end         Move within the current line
help.ctrlV: ctrl+v           Paste an image from the clipboard
help.esc: esc              Interrupt the current model turn
help.slashModel: /model           Select model, thinking mode and effort control
help.slashInit: /init            Initialize an AGENTS.md file with instructions for LLM
help.slashResume: /resume          Pick a previous conversation to continue
help.slashContinue: /continue        Continue the active conversation, or resume one if empty
help.slashUndo: /undo            Restore code and/or conversation to a previous point
help.slashMcp: /mcp             Show MCP server status and available tools
help.slashRaw: /raw             Toggle display mode for viewing or collapsing reasoning content
